headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 13, 2026**
article:
The Seattle Mariners secured a 6-2 victory over the Houston Astros, with Josh Naylor leading the Astros' offense with 2 hits and 2 home runs. George Kirby earned the win for the Mariners, pitching 7.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

Injuries and availability impact continue to affect teams across the league. The Los Angeles Dodgers placed right-handed pitcher Ben Casparius on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. The Baltimore Orioles transferred right-handed pitcher Yaramil Hiraldo from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. The Washington Nationals placed left-handed pitcher Ken Waldichuk on the 15-day injured list due to left forearm tightness and right-handed pitcher Cole Henry on the 15-day injured list due to right rotator cuff strain.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place in the past 24 hours. The Cincinnati Reds traded first baseman Christian Encarnacion-Strand to the Baltimore Orioles for cash. The Chicago White Sox traded second baseman Lenyn Sosa to the Toronto Blue Jays for outfielder Jordan Rich and future considerations. The Milwaukee Brewers traded right fielder Steward Berroa to the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Mariners in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners secured a 6-2 victory over the Houston Astros, with Josh Naylor leading the Astros' offense with 2 hits and 2 home runs. George Kirby earned the win for the Mariners, pitching 7.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall to Orioles in Thrilling 7-9 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-9 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Jeremiah Jackson leading the charge at the plate. Jackson's impressive performance included three hits, two home runs, and five RBIs, with his second home run coming on a fly ball to center field.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Worst Loss of Season**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to the Pittsburgh Pirates 16-5, their worst loss of the season. Paul Skenes earned the win for the Pirates with 6.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Phillies Rout Cubs 13-7**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Chicago Cubs, winning 13-7 behind a strong performance from Cristopher Sánchez, who earned the win with 6.0 innings pitched, 8 strikeouts, and 2 earned runs. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 2 home runs and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Dodgers RHP Ben Casparius Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Ben Casparius has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. The move was made on April 13, 2026.

top_news.title: **Reds Make Roster Move Ahead of Opening Day**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds made a trade on April 13, 2026, sending 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand to the Baltimore Orioles in exchange for cash.
